policy: Measurements retain their original assay denominator and biological context. None is converted to a whole-cell initial value or flux without the missing matched conversion measurement.

human_hepatocyte_proteome_2016.title: In-depth quantitative analysis and comparison of the human hepatocyte and hepatoma cell line HepG2 proteomes
human_hepatocyte_proteome_2016.notes: Quantitative LC-MS/MS of purified hepatocytes from seven human liver donors using Total Protein Approach and Proteomic Ruler.

human_liver_glycogen_mrs_2012.title: Liver metabolite concentrations measured with 1H MR spectroscopy
human_liver_glycogen_mrs_2012.notes: In-vivo human liver tissue measurement; glycogen was quantifiable in 25 participants.

human_mrp2_abundance_2012.title: Interindividual variability in hepatic expression of the multidrug resistance-associated protein 2 (MRP2/ABCC2)
human_mrp2_abundance_2012.notes: Targeted LC-MS/MS of liver membrane fractions from 51 human donors.

human_bsep_taurocholate_2013.title: Early identification of clinically relevant drug interactions with the human bile salt export pump
human_bsep_taurocholate_2013.notes: Taurocholate transport by recombinant human BSEP in inverted Sf9 membrane vesicles.

human_ntcp_uptake_2003.title: Function of uptake transporters for taurocholate and estradiol 17beta-D-glucuronide in cryopreserved human hepatocytes
human_ntcp_uptake_2003.notes: Taurocholate uptake kinetics in fresh and cryopreserved human hepatocytes; cryopreservation caused large activity variability.

human_liver_adenylates_1992.title: Can adenine nucleotides predict primary nonfunction of the human liver homograft?
human_liver_adenylates_1992.notes: HPLC measurements in control human liver tissue: ATP, ADP, AMP, total adenine nucleotides, energy charge and NAD+.

human_liver_atp_synthesis_2008.title: Quantitative ATP synthesis in human liver measured by localized 31P spectroscopy using the magnetization transfer experiment
human_liver_atp_synthesis_2008.notes: In-vivo 31P magnetization-transfer measurements in nine healthy volunteers; the reported rate is apparent Pi-to-ATP exchange.

human_liver_phosphorus_mrs_2017.title: Phosphodiester content measured in human liver by in vivo 31P MR spectroscopy at 7 tesla
human_liver_phosphorus_mrs_2017.notes: Healthy-volunteer liver spectroscopy; reports the 1.054 kg/L liver density used for wet-tissue concentration conversion.

human_liver_glycogen_mixed_meal_2000.title: Direct assessment of hepatic glycogen metabolism in humans with 13C NMR spectroscopy
human_liver_glycogen_mixed_meal_2000.notes: Serial in-vivo human hepatic glycogen measurements around a mixed meal.

human_liver_glycogen_overnight_1996.title: Natural abundance 13C NMR measurement of human liver glycogen
human_liver_glycogen_overnight_1996.notes: Overnight-fasted healthy volunteers measured with localized 13C MRS.

human_liver_glycogen_starvation_1973.title: Liver glycogen in man: the effect of total starvation or a carbohydrate-poor diet followed by carbohydrate refeeding
human_liver_glycogen_starvation_1973.notes: Human liver biopsy glycogen after prolonged starvation or carbohydrate-poor diet.

human_liver_glutathione_1980.title: Glutathione in human liver in normal and pathological conditions
human_liver_glutathione_1980.notes: Total glutathione measured in six histologically normal human liver biopsies, reported per hepatic protein.

human_hepatic_transit_1996.title: An anatomic and physiological model of hepatic vascular system
human_hepatic_transit_1996.notes: Tracer transit-time model fitted in eight normal volunteers; reports portal flow fraction and liver mean transit time.

hmdb_2022.title: HMDB 5.0: the Human Metabolome Database for 2022
hmdb_2022.notes: Curated human blood/plasma concentration reference ranges; specimen compartment is retained explicitly.

primary_hepatocyte_isolation_metabolism_.title: From in vivo to in vitro: Major metabolic alterations take place in hepatocytes during and following isolation
primary_hepatocyte_isolation_metabolism_.notes: Tracks energetic and redox metabolites from in-situ liver through hepatocyte isolation and culture; isolation substantially changes ATP, NADP(H), GSH and GSSG.

anchors.biological_system: purified primary human hepatocytes from surgical liver resections
anchors.assay: LC-MS/MS with Total Protein Approach and Proteomic Ruler
anchors.applicability: Donor-median total ALB protein-group abundance for a reference nucleus.
anchors.limitations: Does not separate intracellular, secretory-pathway and newly secreted albumin, is not a synthesis rate, and is not a per-hepatocyte value for binucleate cells.

anchors.biological_system: purified primary human hepatocytes from surgical liver resections
anchors.applicability: Constrains total BSEP protein abundance in a healthy human-hepatocyte reference cohort.
anchors.limitations: Does not provide canalicular surface fraction, total protein mass per modeled cell, or transport-active copies.

anchors.applicability: Constrains total membrane-fraction MRP2 abundance and its donor variability.
anchors.limitations: Tissue membrane denominator includes multiple membrane pools; canalicular surface fraction and copies per hepatocyte are not measured.

anchors.applicability: Provides an in-vivo healthy-liver glycogen distribution target.
anchors.limitations: Tissue wet-weight concentration is not identical to cytosolic concentration in one hepatocyte and feeding state was not a matched simulation input.

anchors.biological_system: recombinant human BSEP in inverted Sf9 membrane vesicles
anchors.applicability: Independent measured affinity anchor for the BSEP taurocholate rate law.
anchors.limitations: Recombinant vesicle affinity is assay-specific; it is not a whole-hepatocyte flux parameter.

anchors.biological_system: recombinant human BSEP in inverted Sf9 membrane vesicles
anchors.applicability: Constrains the source assay curve when the same assay denominator is represented.
anchors.limitations: Cannot be converted to hepatocyte molecules per second without matched active surface copies or matched membrane-protein mass.

anchors.applicability: Constrains the human-hepatocyte taurocholate uptake affinity range.
anchors.limitations: Measured uptake includes intact-cell context and potentially additional uptake transporters; cryopreserved activity ranged from 10-200% of fresh cells.

anchors.applicability: Constrains the tissue-equivalent ATP pool and adenylate energy charge.
anchors.limitations: Total tissue ATP is not a compartment-resolved free cytosolic ATP measurement in isolated PHH.

anchors.applicability: Constrains the tissue-equivalent ADP pool and adenylate energy charge.
anchors.limitations: Total tissue ADP is not compartment resolved.

anchors.applicability: Constrains the tissue-equivalent AMP pool and adenylate energy charge.
anchors.limitations: Total tissue AMP is not compartment resolved.

anchors.applicability: Validates consistency of the initialized ATP, ADP and AMP pools.
anchors.limitations: Tissue-average energy charge does not resolve hepatocyte zones or organelle compartments.
Does not provide NADH or cytosolic-versus-mitochondrial allocation.

anchors.applicability: Provides a whole-liver apparent Pi-to-ATP exchange observation in its original assay space.
anchors.limitations: Magnetization-transfer exchange does not identify net mitochondrial ATP synthesis, cellular ATP demand, or first-order ADP/ATP rate constants.

anchors.biological_system: healthy human liver in vivo after a mixed meal
anchors.limitations: Whole-liver concentration is used as a tissue-equivalent lumped hepatocyte pool.

anchors.biological_system: healthy human liver in vivo after overnight fast
anchors.limitations: Whole-liver concentration is used as a tissue-equivalent lumped hepatocyte pool.

anchors.biological_system: human liver after total starvation or carbohydrate-poor diet
anchors.limitations: The model uses the range midpoint and retains a tissue-mass-equivalent interpretation.

anchors.applicability: Constrains the total hepatic glutathione pool.
anchors.limitations: Conversion to a model concentration requires an explicit hepatic protein-density assumption and does not resolve GSH from GSSG compartments.

anchors.assay: dynamic tracer imaging with physiological compartment model
anchors.applicability: Sets the first-order replacement timescale of the effective sinusoidal concentration boundary.
anchors.limitations: Whole-liver mean transit time does not resolve one sinusoid, acinar zone or donor-specific perfusion.

anchors.applicability: Defines the postabsorptive glucose concentration range at the blood-facing model boundary.
anchors.limitations: Systemic plasma is used as the effective sinusoidal inlet target; portal-arterial mixing and donor variation are not resolved.

blocking_measurements: per-cell total protein and membrane-protein mass for the modeled cell
canalicular surface-localized BSEP and MRP2 copy numbers
compartment-resolved ATP, ADP and phosphate time courses with matched PHH oxygen consumption
